DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UGATZ ENTERPRISES LLC DBA THE TL
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. AT THE CALLING OF THE CASE THE PLAITNIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE PARTIES AHVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT AND THE CASE HAS SETTLED. THE PLAINTIFF STATED THAT HE DID NOT NEED A FURTURE DATE FOR A PROGRESS REPORT. PLAINTIFF UGATZ ENTERPRISES LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JAMES CENTRANT, OWNER. DEFENDANT EMILIOMITI LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY EMILIO HITIDIERI, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
